name: Minnestrone Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown hamburger, onion, garlic, and pepper.
2. Add the rest of the ingredients except macaroni to a pot.
3. Cook for at least 20 minutes.
4. Stir in the macaroni.
5. Cook until the macaroni is done.
6. If fresh herbs are available, use them as they can significantly enhance the flavor of the soup.
